name.full: Org IT Toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork

description.short: FinOps insight reports plus a Cowork plugin builder for IT teams.
description.full: An IT/admin toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork. ai-finops-report turns the exported Neptune/Cowork credit-consumption CSV logs (per-user, per-group, per-service consumption + Cowork task details) into polished insight deliverables — a zh-TW Word narrative, a Power BI-style Excel dashboard, and an interactive HTML dashboard with slicers — centred on a quantified cost-optimization action plan (cap ungoverned spend, reclaim idle licences, break concentration risk, right-size limits); everything is measured in credits (never a fabricated USD figure). cowork-plugin-builder scaffolds, validates, and packages new Cowork plugins end-to-end into sideload-ready zips — SKILL.md frontmatter whitelist, devPreview manifest with agentSkills + remote MCP agentConnectors, icon generation, and forward-slash packaging — with the known validation gotchas baked in so the first upload passes.
